source_request: Plan GitHub issue #1: Define Kontour Console V0 Event Stream Contract

criteria.description: A spec lists required fields for KontourConsoleEvent.
criteria.notes: Complete. docs/specs/projection-schema.md includes Event Envelope Fields table with required/optional status covering schema, version, id, type, occurredAt, producer, scope, subject, payload, and optional actor/observedAt/correlationId/causationId/sequence/links/extensions.

criteria.description: A spec lists v0 event types and their intended use.
criteria.notes: Complete. docs/specs/projection-schema.md includes V0 Event Type Vocabulary table covering claims, process, gates, review items, evidence, decisions, actions, and exceptions.

criteria.description: A local JSONL file convention is documented.
criteria.notes: Complete. docs/specs/projection-schema.md includes Local JSONL Stream Convention covering path, UTF-8 JSONL, one event per line, append-only writes, event IDs, sequence/order, correlation, causation, backfill, replay, snapshots, and no hosted dependency.

criteria.description: At least three example event sequences exist: Surface claim freshness, Flow gate route-back, Campfit field review.
criteria.notes: Complete. Three JSONL examples exist and are linked from the spec. Independent parse and required-field check passed: campfit-field-review.jsonl 5 events, flow-gate-route-back.jsonl 5 events, surface-claim-freshness.jsonl 3 events.

criteria.description: The spec states how projections are rebuilt from events.
criteria.notes: Complete. docs/specs/projection-schema.md includes Rebuilding Projections From Events with deterministic folding, event-id idempotency, ordering, correlation/causation timelines, link accumulation, snapshot fallback, and derivedFrom streamIds/lastEventId/lastSequence/eventCount.

goal_fit.summary: Execution complete for the v0 event stream contract docs/examples. Formal verification remains a separate verify-work gate.
